enriched_points.expanded_content: Functional nanocomposites enhance energy storage technologies like lithium-ion batteries and supercapacitors, improving capacity, efficiency, and sustainability through advanced material combinations.
Utilizing nanocomposites in coatings offers superior corrosion resistance, protecting metals and extending the lifespan of structures, crucial for infrastructure and automotive applications.
Incorporating nanomaterials into polymers significantly boosts flame retardant properties, providing safety in construction and electronics by reducing flammability and improving thermal stability.
Nanocomposites play a vital role in environmental cleanup by effectively adsorbing pollutants and heavy metals, showcasing potential in water purification and soil remediation efforts.
